x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist core plugins are the prerequisite gate for all AI features. Without active plugins no Now Assist capability can function regardless of data quality or entitlement.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist Core via the ServiceNow Store or sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation. Now Assist Core is the prerequisite gate for all Now Assist module capabilities.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0e
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist core plugins are the prerequisite gate for all AI features. Without active plugins no Now Assist capability can function regardless of data quality or entitlement.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Now Assist Core Plugin Activation</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var core = checkPlugin("now_assist_core", "now_assist_core");

    // Functional fallback: check sys_scope if not found in store/plugins
    if (!core.found) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_scope");
        gr.addQuery("scope", "now_assist_core");
        gr.addQuery("active", true);
        gr.setLimit(1);
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next()) {
            core.found = true;
            core.table = "sys_scope";
        }
    }

    // Count all now_assist store apps for context
    var totalNA = 0;
    try {
        var naGA = new GlideAggregate("sys_store_app");
        naGA.addQuery("scope", "CONTAINS", "now_assist");
        naGA.addAggregate("COUNT");
        naGA.query();
        totalNA = naGA.next() ? parseInt(naGA.getAggregate("COUNT")) || 0 : 0;
    } catch(e) {}

    var actualValue = "now_assist_core: " + (core.found ? "active (source: " + core.table + ")" : "inactive") +
                      " | " + totalNA + " total Now Assist apps installed";

    if (core.found) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Now Assist Core is active (" + totalNA + " Now Assist app(s) total). Core prerequisite gate satisfied -- module-specific Now Assist capabilities can be enabled." };
    } else {
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Now Assist Core (now_assist_core) is not active. Now Assist Core must be installed and active before any AI capability can function." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000480</number><order>10</order><remediation_guidance>Activate Now Assist Core via the ServiceNow Store or sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation. Now Assist Core is the prerequisite gate for all Now Assist module capabilities.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>0ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Now Assist Core Plugin Activation</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_0ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
